agency_name: Pennsylvania Department of Health / Pennsylvania Department of Environmental Protection
repeat_testing_guidance: Pennsylvania does not publish a single universal PFAS retesting cadence for all private wells in Sharp v1. Keep repeat testing tied to accredited-lab interpretation, Pennsylvania agency guidance, and any site-specific investigation follow-up.
benchmark_notes: Pennsylvania private wells are owner-managed, not regulated public-water systems. Pennsylvania's PFAS MCL rule can supply reference context for covered analytes, but private-well outputs should stay reference-based and should not be framed as compliance findings.
